---
title: "**Introduction to Statistics and Computation with Data: Midterm Worksheet**"
author: "Daibik Barik (Bmat2316)"
date: "2024-02-23"
output: pdf_document
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```
\newpage

```{r}
SupDF = read.csv(file= "./SuppandiZoomLog.csv", header = TRUE)
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = SupDF) +  
  geom_bar(mapping = aes(x = Venue, fill = Meeting.Topic)) + 
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "turbo") + coord_polar() +
  ggtitle("Location Frequency plot") + 
  ylab("No. of meetings") + xlab("Locations") + 
  theme(plot.title =element_text(color="#000080",size=14, 
                                 face="bold",hjust= 0.5))
```
